workflow.name: Generate AI songs from text prompts with Suno, OpenAI, Google Drive and Slack
workflow.description:
Build a fully automated music generation workflow in n8n using Suno to create and store AI-generated songs.

### What's the Goal?
Automate end-to-end AI music creation — from a simple text prompt to a fully generated, stored, and shareable song — using Suno's API inside n8n with zero manual effort.

### Why Does It Matter?
AI music generation is powerful but manual. This workflow lets you batch-generate songs, integrate music into apps or content pipelines, and store outputs automatically — saving hours of repetitive work.

### How It Works
1. Webhook or Schedule triggers the flow with a text prompt
2. Prompt is enriched/formatted for best Suno results
3. Suno API call initiates song generation
4. Workflow polls until song is ready (async wait loop)
5. Song metadata & audio URL retrieved
6. File downloaded and saved to cloud storage (Google Drive / S3)
7. Metadata logged to Google Sheets / Airtable
8. Notification sent via Slack / Email

### Configuration Requirements
- Suno API key (via RapidAPI or official Suno API access)
- Cloud storage credentials (Google Drive / AWS S3)
- Google Sheets or Airtable credentials (for logging)
- Slack Bot Token or SMTP (for notifications)
- Optional: OpenAI API key (for prompt enrichment)

### Setup Guide
1. Import workflow into n8n
2. Connect credentials (Suno/RapidAPI, Google Drive, Sheets, Slack)
3. Configure Set node: default genre, mood, duration, style tags
4. Test with a manual trigger and a sample prompt
5. Activate webhook → send prompts to trigger URL
6. Monitor generation status and tune polling interval
7. Check storage & logs for generated songs

### Contact Us
https://www.oneclickitsolution.com/contact-us/

workflow.name: n8n Suno Music Automation: Generate Custom AI Songs from Text Prompts

parameters.content:
## 🎵 n8n Suno Music Automation
### Generate Custom AI Songs from Text Prompts

Build a fully automated music generation workflow in n8n using Suno to create and store AI-generated songs.

### What's the Goal?
Automate end-to-end AI music creation — from a simple text prompt to a fully generated, stored, and shareable song — using Suno's API inside n8n with zero manual effort.

### Why Does It Matter?
AI music generation is powerful but manual. This workflow lets you batch-generate songs, integrate music into apps or content pipelines, and store outputs automatically — saving hours of repetitive work.

### How It Works
1. Webhook or Schedule triggers the flow with a text prompt
2. Prompt is enriched/formatted for best Suno results
3. Suno API call initiates song generation
4. Workflow polls until song is ready (async wait loop)
5. Song metadata & audio URL retrieved
6. File downloaded and saved to cloud storage (Google Drive / S3)
7. Metadata logged to Google Sheets / Airtable
8. Notification sent via Slack / Email

### Configuration Requirements
- Suno API key (via RapidAPI or official Suno API access)
- Cloud storage credentials (Google Drive / AWS S3)
- Google Sheets or Airtable credentials (for logging)
- Slack Bot Token or SMTP (for notifications)
- Optional: OpenAI API key (for prompt enrichment)

### Setup Guide
1. Import workflow into n8n
2. Connect credentials (Suno/RapidAPI, Google Drive, Sheets, Slack)
3. Configure Set node: default genre, mood, duration, style tags
4. Test with a manual trigger and a sample prompt
5. Activate webhook → send prompts to trigger URL
6. Monitor generation status and tune polling interval
7. Check storage & logs for generated songs

## 1. Trigger & Prompt Input
Webhook or schedule → receive and prepare the music prompt

## 2. Prompt Enrichment
Use AI to enhance prompt with genre, mood & style tags for best Suno output

## 3. Suno Generation & Polling
Submit to Suno API → poll until song is ready

## 4. Store, Log & Notify
Download audio → Cloud Storage → Log → Slack alert

string.name: default_prompt
string.value: An uplifting electronic pop song about chasing your dreams

parameters.text:
={{ '🎵 New AI Song Generated!

*Title:* ' + $('Suno: Poll Song Status').item.json[0].title + '
*Prompt:* ' + $('OpenAI: Enrich Prompt').item.json.message.content + '
*Listen:* ' + $('Suno: Poll Song Status').item.json[0].audio_url + '
*Saved to Drive ✅*' }}

={{ '❌ Song Generation Failed

*Job ID:* ' + $('Suno: Submit Generation Job').item.json[0].id + '
*Status:* ' + $json[0].status + '
*Error:* ' + ($json[0].error_message || 'Unknown error') }}

user.name: Oneclick AI Squad
user.bio: The AI Squad Initiative is a pioneering effort to build, automate and scale AI-powered workflows using n8n.io. Our mission is to help individuals and businesses integrate AI agents seamlessly into their daily operations  from automating tasks and enhancing productivity to creating innovative, intelligent solutions. We design modular, reusable AI workflow templates that empower creators, developers and teams to supercharge their automation with minimal effort and maximum impact.

data.details:
The IF node can be used to implement binary conditional logic in your workflow. You can set up one-to-many conditions to evaluate each item of data being inputted into the node. That data will either evaluate to TRUE or FALSE and route out of the node accordingly.

This node has multiple types of conditions: Bool, String, Number, and Date & Time.
